title: tocoyena arenicola
intro: Tocoyena arenicola, also known as the golden trumpet vine, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tocoyena arenicola include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
